name: kora-v1
description: Kora Framework development skill for building production-grade Java/Kotlin services — with compile-time DI, HTTP, Database, Kafka, gRPC, SOAP, OpenAPI, Telemetry, AOP. Zero reflection, zero proxies, AI agent friendly. For Kora version 1.x

interface.longDescription: AI coding agent skills for building Kora Framework 1.x services with compile-time DI, HTTP, database, Kafka, gRPC, SOAP/WSDL, OpenAPI, telemetry, AOP, testing, and project setup guidance.
defaultPrompt: What is Kora Framework and why its good for coding agents?
Explain Kora Framework basics for a beginner?
Setup Kora HelloWorld application and explain it to me
